meaning: n.兄弟(用于意大利教士姓名前的称号)
examples: It is up to Mr LaHood and the FRA to make sense of this jumble.
FRA expects a significant increase in the number of HSR operations.
FRA agrees that these are valid concerns that deserve consideration.
Most train accidents, by a wide margin, are caused by track issues, the FRA says.
The FRA has also had its remit extended from monitoring "foreign military threats" to all "external threats".
